prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（理科）最低位次分别为10662→10143→15514→23524→13302，2023年因新高考改革首年出现大幅后移，2024年进一步后移至23524（专业组细分导致），2025年回升至13302，近两年波动剧烈，2025年基准约13302名；该校在广西物理类招生计划：2021年109人、2022年109人、2023年107人、2024年113人、2025年114人；2026年计划115人，较2025年微扩1人，扩幅约0.88%，对竞争格局影响极小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第56名，近年排名稳定在48–61区间，属中上水平理工类高校；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度排名未进入前100，曝光度一般，未形成额外报考热度驱动；地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统王牌学科（第五轮学科评估A+），地球物理学、测绘科学与技术等亦为强势学科，与该校招生专业高度关联，对相关方向考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校招生以工科为主，契合当前报考偏好；广西2026年考生总数约39.2万，较2025年增长约3.3%，物理类估算约26.9万人，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13302、2026年计划微扩0.88%、本省考生规模增长约3.3%以及工科专业热度持续等因素，供需弹性主值指向13372名，考虑考生增加带来的竞争压力略大于扩招缓解效应，预测最低位次约13400名，区间12900–13900名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (Science) were 10662 → 10143 → 15514 → 23524 → 13302 respectively. In 2023, due to the first year of the new Gaokao reform, there was a significant drop; in 2024, it further dropped to 23524 (due to detailed major group division); in 2025, it rebounded to 13302. The fluctuations in the past two years have been severe, with the 2025 baseline around 13302. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Physics Category: 109 in 2021, 109 in 2022, 107 in 2023, 113 in 2024, 114 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 115, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 0.88%, which has minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 48–61 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking has not entered the top 100, with average exposure, not forming additional driving force for application popularity. Geology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional ace disciplines (A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), and Geophysics, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology are also strong disciplines, highly related to the university's enrollment majors, providing stable attraction for candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., have consistently high social popularity. The university's enrollment is mainly in engineering, aligning with current application preferences. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025, with an estimated 269,000 in Physics Category, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13302, the 2026 plan expansion of 0.88%, the increase in local candidate numbers by about 3.3%, and the sustained popularity of engineering majors, the main supply-demand elasticity value points to 13372. Taking into account that the competitive pressure from the increase in candidates slightly outweighs the easing effect of enrollment expansion, the predicted minimum ranking is about 13400, with a range of 12900–13900.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12900–13900, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12500), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 ace majors (Geophysics Top Talent Program, Geology Base Class, Computer Science). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 13800), you should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, at an upper-middle level; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity is average, not generating additional application heat; Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are A+ disciplines, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, Business Administration, Administrative Management, etc.) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.
